visuals.title: Transformation Concatenation Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Transformation Concatenation Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Transformation in Homogeneous Coordinates</text>

  <!-- Standard Coordinates -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Standard Coordinates
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    (x, y)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Transformation Matrix -->
  <rect x="200" y="100" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="240" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Matrix
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Standard to Matrix -->
  <path d="M170 110 L200 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Homogeneous Coordinates -->
  <rect x="300" y="80" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="360" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Homogeneous Coords
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="360" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    (x, y, w)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Matrix to Homogeneous -->
  <path d="M280 110 L300 110" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Transformation Examples -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Translation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="160" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Rotation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="270" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scaling
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Matrix Representation -->
  <rect x="100" y="250" width="220" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Homogeneous Transformation Matrix
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    [a b c; d e f; 0 0 1]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows from examples to matrix -->
  <path d="M100 220 L150 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M210 220 L210 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M320 220 L270 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>

nodes.label: Pre-Multiply Matrices: M = Tn * ... * T2 * T1
